NAME

examples.c - EXAMPLES section generator for man pages.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct mode_bit_name_t
Mode name mapping for bitmask extraction.

char * manpage_content_generate_examples (const options_config_t *config)

char
  * manpage_content_generate_examples (const options_config_t * config)


Definition at line 79 of file examples.c.


79                                                                         {
80   if (!config) {
81     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(1, char *);
82     buffer[0] = '\0';
83     return buffer;
84   }
85 
86   if (config->num_examples == 0) {
87     // Generate fallback content when no examples are defined
88     size_t buffer_capacity = 256;
89     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
90     size_t offset = 0;
91     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\nNo examples available for this mode.\n");
92     log_debug("Generated EXAMPLES section (fallback - no examples found)");
93     return buffer;
94   }
95 
96   // Seed random number generator for mode selection
97   // Use config pointer address for deterministic-but-varied seed
98   srand((unsigned int)((uintptr_t)config));
99 
100   // Allocate growing buffer for examples section
101   size_t buffer_capacity = 8192;
102   char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
103   size_t offset = 0;
104 
105   for (size_t i = 0; i < config->num_examples; i++) {
106     const example_descriptor_t *example = &config->examples[i];
107 
108     // Get all mode names from bitmask (examples can apply to multiple modes)
109     // For man pages, we only show each example once, randomly selecting one mode
110     size_t num_modes = 0;
111     const char **mode_names = get_all_mode_names_from_bitmask(example->mode_bitmask, &num_modes);
112 
113     // Ensure buffer is large enough
114     if (offset + 512 >= buffer_capacity) {
115       buffer_capacity *= 2;
116       buffer = SAFE_REALLOC(buffer, buffer_capacity, char *);
117     }
118 
119     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".TP\n");
120     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B ascii-chat");
121 
122     // Add mode name if applicable (randomly select one mode for multi-mode examples)
123     if (num_modes > 0) {
124       size_t selected_mode = (size_t)rand() % num_modes;
125       if (mode_names[selected_mode]) {
126         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, " %s", mode_names[selected_mode]);
127       }
128     }
129 
130     if (example->args) {
131       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, " %s", example->args);
132     }
133     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "\n");
134 
135     if (example->description) {
136       offset +=
137           safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "%s\n", escape_groff_special(example->description));
138     }
139 
140     // Free mode names array
141     if (mode_names) {
142       SAFE_FREE(mode_names);
143     }
144   }
145 
146   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "\n");
147 
148   return buffer;
149 }






References escape_groff_special(), and
    safe_snprintf().


Referenced by options_config_generate_manpage_merged(), and
    options_config_generate_manpage_template().
